extraction.one_line_summary: PADUN Mark soloed to stage win on La Plagne, PORTE Richie took yellow by finishing second and gaining time bonuses over LUTSENKO Alexey.
tactical_patterns: VALGREN Michael attacked solo from breakaway at base of La Plagne, demonstrating superior pacing judgment over companion escapees.
PORTE Richie launched acceleration in final kilometer specifically targeting time bonuses, not stage win, gaining yellow mathematically.
CRADDOCK Lawson bridged from peloton to early break rather than staying in first group, tactical choice for KOM points.
LUTSENKO Alexey unable to respond to PORTE's acceleration despite sitting on wheel, suggesting inadequate high-altitude finishing power.

rider_signals.PADUN Mark: positive: 24-year-old outclimbed KUSS Sepp on steep summit finish, revealing top-tier high-altitude capacity beyond expected level
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: deliberately targeted time bonuses over stage win with final kilometer acceleration, precise tactical execution for GC
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: negative: dropped 17 seconds to PORTE despite drafting position, confirming insufficient form for sustained beyond-category finish
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: dropped on descent after Roseline climb despite climbing adequately, positioning deficit proved terminal
rider_signals.KRUIJSWIJK Steven: negative: lost significant time on final climb from ninth GC position, unexpectedly weak on terrain suited to profile
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: negative: described as 'in trouble' in final kilometer, collapsed from contending position on decisive gradient
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: neutral: held top-10 but outclimbed by PADUN, suggesting domestique pacing rather than personal result focus
rider_signals.CRADDOCK Lawson: positive: bridged to breakaway mid-race and captured KOM jersey through aggressive intermediate targeting
